zh.Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham於1043年出生在英國越可爾迪可爾時，他的父親Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli53歲，母親Muriel de Chappell4歲。他和Amieria de Montgomery至少有8個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1098年在英國格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德享年55歲。

zh-hans.Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham于1043年出生在英国越可爾迪可爾时，他的父亲Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli53岁，母亲Muriel de Chappell4岁。他和Amieria de Montgomery至少有8个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1098年在英国格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bussel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from the genitive form of   Busse   1.

variants.name: Bussan
meanings: Americanized form of an unidentified German surname, most likely   Bussen  .
History: Felix Bussan, born in Germany, arrived in New York in 1897, on board the Normannia. Willy Bussan, born in Germany, left Hamburg on board the Deutschland and arrived in New York in 1907.

variants.name: Busse
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ewald, Ernst, Fritz, Konrad, Claus, Eberhard, Eckhard, Frieda, Fritzi, Gerhard, Helmuth.
German: variant of   Buss  . This surname is also found in Poland. Compare   Bussey  .
North German (Büsse): metonymic occupational name for a maker of boxes and containers or for a gunsmith, from Middle Low German büsse, busse ‘box, gun, rifle’.

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham was born in 1043, in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, his father, Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli, was 53 and his mother, Muriel de Chappell, was 4. He had at least 8 sons and 5 daughters with Amieria de Montgomery. He died in 1098, in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham est né en 1043, à Tickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Muriel de Chappell, avait 4 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles avec Amieria de Montgomery. Il est décédé en 1098, à Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham 1043 in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli 53 und seine Mutter Muriel de Chappell 4. Er hatte mit Amieria de Montgomery mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1098 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham è nato il nel 1043 nel Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Muriel de Chappell, aveva 4 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie con Amieria de Montgomery. Morì nel 1098, nel Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penworthamが1043年にイギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒルで生まれた時，父Lord Tickhill Roger de Busliは53歳，母Muriel de Chappellは4歳であった。彼はAmieria de Montgomeryとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1098年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケンプスフォードで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham(이)가 1043년 영국 요르크실르 티크힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Muriel de Chappell(은)는 4세였다. 그는 Amieria de Montgomery(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1098년 영국 그루스스터실르 케프스퍼드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham nasceu em 1043, em Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Muriel de Chappell, tinha 4 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas com Amieria de Montgomery. Ele faleceu em 1098, em Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham родился в 1043 г. в местности тиккхилл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Muriel de Chappell, 4. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Amieria de Montgomery. Он умер в 1098 г. в местности кемпсфорд, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sheriff Warin Bussel "The Bald" 1St Baron Of Penwortham nació en 1043, en Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Muriel de Chappell, tenía 4 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas con Amieria de Montgomery. Murió en 1098, en Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
